TTim Sung · SVA聲樂導師（現正修讀英國音樂治療碩士）

課程介紹 Course Introduction

Tim 過去一年在英國進修音樂治療，即將於今年暑假期回港！他整合了過去一年的學習，為 SVA 同學設計了《音樂治療 × 自我探索》課程，和大家一起探討：「如何以自己的聲音和音樂做到自我的探索。」 Tim has spent the past year studying Music Therapy in the UK and is returning to Hong Kong this summer! Drawing on a year of study, he has designed "Music Therapy × Self-Exploration" for SVA students — exploring together how we can use our own voice and music to discover ourselves.

在 3 節課程裡，每位參加者都可在安全及保密的環境下，以音樂、歌唱或單純去感受。 Across 3 sessions, each participant can use music, singing, or simply feel and be present — all within a safe and confidential environment.

本系列由 Tim Sung 主講，帶你認識音樂治療的基本概念、學術根據及實際應用。適合有興趣了解 Therapeutic Sound 及音樂治療的朋友，無需任何音樂基礎。 This series is led by Tim Sung, introducing the core concepts, academic foundations, and real-world applications of music therapy. Suitable for anyone curious about Therapeutic Sound and music therapy — no musical background required.

*同學可以報名8月於 SVA STUDIO 的面授課，時間為星期五晚7:30pm。詳情會於7月中公佈。 *You may apply for the in-person course at SVA Studio this August — every Friday 7:30pm. Details to be announced mid-July.
